blended.narrative: Gore Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
